```{r}
pdf("figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS1_CiteSeq_volcano_plots.pdf", width = 6, height = 6)
for (i in 1:ncol(citeseq_F)) {
  p <- plot_scatterplot(i, n_higlight = 10)
  print(p)
}
dev.off()
```


## Figure S2: UMAP plots

```{r}
# Plot all UMAPs
umap_result <- readRDS(paste0(data_path, "umap_result.rds"))
colnames(umap_result) <- c("UMAP_1", "UMAP_2")
umap_result <- umap_result[rownames(L_pm_filtered),]
df_umap <- as.data.frame(umap_result)
```

```{r}
plot_loadings_on_umap_v2 <- function(umap, loading, factor_num,
                                     size = 0.25,
                                     show_bg = TRUE,
                                     bg_alpha = 0.05,
                                     bg_color = "grey90",
                                     clip_q = 0.99,
                                     top_q = NULL,
                                     viridis_option = "viridis",
                                     viridis_direction = 1) {
  stopifnot(is.matrix(umap) || is.data.frame(umap))
  df <- as.data.frame(umap)
  stopifnot(all(c("UMAP_1","UMAP_2") %in% colnames(df)))
  stopifnot(nrow(df) == length(loading))

  q_hi <- stats::quantile(loading, probs = clip_q, na.rm = TRUE)
  loading_clip <- pmin(loading, q_hi)

  if (!is.null(top_q)) {
    stopifnot(top_q > 0 && top_q < 1)
    thr <- stats::quantile(loading_clip, probs = top_q, na.rm = TRUE)
    loading_plot <- ifelse(loading_clip >= thr, loading_clip, NA_real_)
  } else {
    loading_plot <- loading_clip
  }

  df$loading_plot <- loading_plot

  p <- ggplot() +
    # --- background layer (raster) ---
    {
      if (show_bg)
        scattermore::geom_scattermore(
          data = df,
          mapping = aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2),
          pointsize = size,          # size in pixels
          color = bg_color,
          alpha = bg_alpha
        )
    } +
    # --- colored loading layer (raster) ---
    scattermore::geom_scattermore(
      data = df,
      mapping = aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2, color = loading_plot),
      pointsize = size*2,
      alpha = 1,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(
      option   = viridis_option,
      direction = viridis_direction,
      limits   = c(0, q_hi),
      oob      = scales::squish,
      breaks   = scales::pretty_breaks(4),
      name     = paste0("K", factor_num, " loading")
    ) +
    coord_equal() +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Factor ", factor_num),
      x = "", y = ""
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank())

  p
}
```

```{r}
selected_factors <- 1:ncol(L_pm_filtered)
sample_n <- 80000
set.seed(1)
sample_index <- sample(seq_len(nrow(L_pm_filtered)), size = min(sample_n, nrow(L_pm_filtered)))
umap_sub <- umap_result[sample_index, , drop = FALSE]
L_sub    <- L_pm_filtered[sample_index, selected_factors, drop = FALSE]

pdf("figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS2_UMAP_loadings_plots.pdf", width = 8, height = 8,
    useDingbats = FALSE)
for (f in selected_factors) {
  p <-  plot_loadings_on_umap_v2(
    umap    = umap_sub,
    loading = L_sub[, f],
    factor_num = f,
    size = 0.4,
    show_bg = TRUE,
    bg_alpha = 0.06,
    clip_q = 0.99,
    top_q = NULL,
    viridis_option = "viridis",
    viridis_direction = 1
  )
  print(p)
}
dev.off()
```

## Figure S3: correlation plot

```{r}
cor_matrix <- cor(L_pm, method = "pearson")
colnames(L_pm) <- paste0("K", seq_len(ncol(L_pm)))
colnames(cor_matrix) <- paste0("K", seq_len(ncol(cor_matrix)))
rownames(cor_matrix) <- paste0("K", seq_len(nrow(cor_matrix)))
```

```{r}
plot_gp_corr_by_level1 <- function(
  cor_full,        # filtered full correlation matrix (e.g., after high_corr_indices)
  L_pm,            # loading matrix: cells x GPs
  seurat_meta,     # metadata with annotation_level1, same row order as L_pm
  level1_type = c("all"),
  clustering_method = "complete",
  main_prefix = "Correlation map of GP loadings",
  width = 8,
  height = 8,
  show_names = TRUE,
  filename = NULL
) {
  # ---- Basic checks ----
  if (nrow(L_pm) != nrow(seurat_meta)) {
    stop("L_pm and seurat_meta must have the same number of rows (cells).")
  }
  if (is.null(seurat_meta$annotation_level1)) {
    stop("seurat_meta must contain a column named 'annotation_level1'.")
  }
  if (is.null(colnames(cor_full)) || is.null(rownames(cor_full))) {
    stop("cor_full must have rownames and colnames (GP names).")
  }
  if (is.null(colnames(L_pm))) {
    stop("L_pm must have column names (GP names) to match cor_full.")
  }
  
  # Make sure level1_type is scalar character
  level1_type <- as.character(level1_type)[1]
  
  # put this near the top (before calling pheatmap)
  breaks_use <- seq(-0.6, 1, length.out = 201)  # 100 bins
  cols_use   <- colorRampPalette(c("blue","white","red"))(length(breaks_use) - 1)
  
  ## ------------------------------------------------------------
  ## 1. Run pheatmap on full correlation ONCE to get the ordering
  ##    (this uses clustering; plot is suppressed with silent=TRUE)
  ## ------------------------------------------------------------
  res_all <- pheatmap(
    cor_full,
    clustering_method = clustering_method,
    show_rownames     = show_names,
    show_colnames     = show_names,
    color  = cols_use,
    breaks = breaks_use,
    main              = paste0(main_prefix, " (all cells, for ordering)"),
    treeheight_row    = 0,
    treeheight_col    = 0,
    silent            = TRUE        # don't actually draw this plot
  )
  
  gp_order <- res_all$tree_row$order
  gp_names <- rownames(cor_full)[gp_order]
  
  ## ------------------------------------------------------------
  ## 2. Construct the correlation matrix to plot for this level1
  ## ------------------------------------------------------------
  if (identical(level1_type, "all")) {
    # Just use the full correlation, reordered
    cor_plot  <- cor_full[gp_names, gp_names, drop = FALSE]
    main_title <- paste0(main_prefix, " (all cells)")
  } else {
    # Subset cells by level1_type
    cell_idx <- which(seurat_meta$annotation_level1 == level1_type)
    if (length(cell_idx) == 0) {
      stop("No cells found with annotation_level1 == ", level1_type)
    }
    
    L_sub <- L_pm[cell_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    
    # Keep the same GPs as in cor_full
    common_gps <- intersect(colnames(cor_full), colnames(L_sub))
    if (length(common_gps) == 0) {
      stop("No overlapping GP names between cor_full and L_pm.")
    }
    # enforce same order as gp_names
    common_gps <- gp_names[gp_names %in% common_gps]
    L_sub <- L_sub[, common_gps, drop = FALSE]
    
    # Correlation for this subset of cells
    cor_sub <- cor(L_sub, method = "pearson")
    
    # Reorder using the same gp_names ordering
    cor_plot  <- cor_sub[gp_names, gp_names, drop = FALSE]
    main_title <- paste0(main_prefix, " in ", level1_type, " cells")
  }
  
  ## ------------------------------------------------------------
  ## 3. Draw heatmap (no clustering here; we already fixed order)
  ## ------------------------------------------------------------
  if (is.null(filename)) {
    res <- pheatmap(
      cor_plot,
      cluster_rows   = FALSE,
      cluster_cols   = FALSE,
      show_rownames  = show_names,
      show_colnames  = show_names,
      color  = cols_use,
      breaks = breaks_use,
      main           = main_title,
      treeheight_row = 0,
      treeheight_col = 0
    )
  } else {
    res <- pheatmap(
      cor_plot,
      cluster_rows   = FALSE,
      cluster_cols   = FALSE,
      show_rownames  = show_names,
      show_colnames  = show_names,
      color  = cols_use,
      breaks = breaks_use,
      main           = main_title,
      treeheight_row = 0,
      treeheight_col = 0,
      filename       = filename,
      width          = width,
      height         = height
    )
  }
  
  res
}
```


```{r}
# 1) All cells
plot_gp_corr_by_level1(
  cor_full    = cor_matrix,
  L_pm        = L_pm,
  seurat_meta = seurat_meta,
  width = 25,
  height = 25,
  level1_type = "all",
  filename    = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS3_correlation/Correlation_Map_All_GPs.png"
)

# 2) CD4
plot_gp_corr_by_level1(
  cor_full    = cor_matrix,
  L_pm        = L_pm,
  width = 25,
  height = 25,
  seurat_meta = seurat_meta,
  level1_type = "CD4",
  filename    = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS3_correlation/Correlation_Map_CD4_GPs.png"
)

# 3) CD8
plot_gp_corr_by_level1(
  cor_full    = cor_matrix,
  L_pm        = L_pm,
  seurat_meta = seurat_meta,
  level1_type = "CD8",
  width = 25,
  height = 25,
  filename    = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS3_correlation/Correlation_Map_CD8_GPs.png"
)

# 4) Treg
plot_gp_corr_by_level1(
  cor_full    = cor_matrix,
  L_pm        = L_pm,
  seurat_meta = seurat_meta,
  level1_type = "Treg",
  width = 25,
  height = 25,
  filename    = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS3_correlation/Correlation_Map_Treg_GPs.png"
)

# 5) DN
plot_gp_corr_by_level1(
  cor_full    = cor_matrix,
  L_pm        = L_pm,
  seurat_meta = seurat_meta,
  level1_type = "DN",
  width = 25,
  height = 25,
  filename    = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS3_correlation/Correlation_Map_DN_GPs.png"
)

# 6) DP
plot_gp_corr_by_level1(
  cor_full    = cor_matrix,
  L_pm        = L_pm,
  seurat_meta = seurat_meta,
  level1_type = "DP",
  width = 25,
  height = 25,
  filename    = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS3_correlation/Correlation_Map_DP_GPs.png"
)

# 7) nonconv
plot_gp_corr_by_level1(
  cor_full    = cor_matrix,
  L_pm        = L_pm,
  seurat_meta = seurat_meta,
  level1_type = "nonconv",
  width = 25,
  height = 25,
  filename    = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS3_correlation/Correlation_Map_nonconv_GPs.png"
)

# 8) gdT
plot_gp_corr_by_level1(
  cor_full    = cor_matrix,
  L_pm        = L_pm,
  seurat_meta = seurat_meta,
  level1_type = "gdT",
  width = 25,
  height = 25,
  filename    = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS3_correlation/Correlation_Map_gdT_GPs.png"
)

# 9) CD8aa
plot_gp_corr_by_level1(
  cor_full    = cor_matrix,
  L_pm        = L_pm,
  seurat_meta = seurat_meta,
  level1_type = "CD8aa",
  width = 25,
  height = 25,
  filename    = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS3_correlation/Correlation_Map_CD8aa_GPs.png"
)
```






## Figure S4: contrast of protein heatmap

```{r}
selected_cells <- (seurat_meta_filtered$cellID)
protein_flash_summary_lognorm <- readRDS(file = paste0(data_path, "protein_flash_selected_summary_lognorm.rds"))

# normalize by the max abs of each column
D_lognorm <- diag(apply(Protein_F_pm, 2, function(x) max(abs(x))))
Protein_F_pm <- Protein_F_pm %*% solve(D_lognorm)
# colnames(Protein_F_pm) <- paste0("F", 1:ncol(flashier_snmf_summary$F_pm))[ flashier_snmf_summary$pve > 1e-4]
factor.info <- read.csv(
  file = paste0(data_path, "factors_comments_updated.xlsx - factor_pve.csv"), 
  header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
factors_considered <- sort(factor.info$X[factor.info$strongly.replicated])
colnames(Protein_F_pm) <- paste0("F", factors_considered)
```

```{r}
compute_le_effects_fix <- function (effects_matrix) 
{
    if (!(is.matrix(effects_matrix) & is.numeric(effects_matrix))) 
        stop("Input \"effects_matrix\" should be a numeric matrix")
    k <- ncol(effects_matrix)
    if (k <= 1) 
        return(effects_matrix)
    out <- effects_matrix
    for (j in 1:k) {
        x <- effects_matrix[, j, drop = FALSE]
        i <- which(x > 0)
        if (length(i) > 0) {
            y <- cbind(0, effects_matrix[i, -j, drop = FALSE])
            out[i, j] <- pmax(0, x[i] - apply(y, 1, max))
        }
        i <- which(x < 0)
        if (length(i) > 0) {
            y <- cbind(0, effects_matrix[i, -j, drop = FALSE])
            out[i, j] <- pmin(0, x[i] - apply(y, 1, min))
        }
    }
    return(out)
}
Protein_F_pm_contrast <- compute_le_effects_fix(Protein_F_pm)
```

```{r}
# drop columns with all zeros and rows with all zeros
Protein_F_pm_contrast <- Protein_F_pm_contrast[rowSums(Protein_F_pm_contrast != 0) > 0, 
                                               colSums(Protein_F_pm_contrast != 0) > 0]

# only show column and row with at least one value with abs > threshold
threshold <- 0.2
Protein_F_pm_contrast_filtered <- Protein_F_pm_contrast[apply(Protein_F_pm_contrast, 1, function(x) any(abs(x) > threshold)), 
                                                         apply(Protein_F_pm_contrast, 2, function(x) any(abs(x) > threshold))]

```


```{r}
# heatmap
annotation_heatmap(Protein_F_pm_contrast_filtered,n = 3,
                   dim = colnames(Protein_F_pm_contrast_filtered),
                   show_dims = colnames(Protein_F_pm_contrast_filtered),
                   compare_dims = colnames(Protein_F_pm_contrast_filtered),
                   select_features = "all",
                   feature_sign = "both",
                   zero_value = 0.1,
                   font_size = 15) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "plain",size = 8)) +
  labs(
    size  = "l.e. effect size",  
    color = "effect sign"
  )
ggsave(filename = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS4_Protein_Heatmap_Contrast.pdf",
       width = 8, height = 8)
```





## Figure S5: Sparsity of GPs

```{r}
load(paste0(data_path, "flashier_snmf_fitted_prior.rda"))
l_pi_vec <- c()
for (i in 1:200) {
  l_pi_vec <- c(l_pi_vec, flashier_snmf_fitted_prior$L_ghat[[i]]$pi[1])
}
f_pi_vec <- c()
for (i in 1:200) {
  f_pi_vec <- c(f_pi_vec, flashier_snmf_fitted_prior$F_ghat[[i]]$pi[1])
}
```

Convert sparsity to expect active cells/genes from the fitted prior:

```{r}
e_cells <- (1 - l_pi_vec) * nrow(L_pm)
e_genes <- (1 - f_pi_vec) * nrow(F_pm)

p_cells <- (1 - l_pi_vec)
p_genes <- (1 - f_pi_vec)

# round to integers
e_cells <- round(e_cells)
e_genes <- round(e_genes)
```

```{r}
options(scipen = 999)
pdf("figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS5_hist_e_active_cells.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
hist(e_cells, breaks = 100, xlab = "Expected number of active cells", main = "Histogram of expected active cells per GP", freq = T)
dev.off()
pdf("figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS5_hist_e_active_genes.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
hist(e_genes, breaks = 100, xlab = "Expected number of active genes", main = "Histogram of expected active genes per GP", freq = T)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
plot(
  e_cells, e_genes,
  xlab = "Expected number of active cells",
  ylab = "Expected number of active genes",
  log = "xy",
  main = "Expected active cells vs genes per GP"
)
idx_highlight <- c(3, 22, 30, 58, 68)
labels_highlight <- paste0("K", idx_highlight)
cols_highlight   <- c("red", "blue", "darkgreen", "pink", "skyblue")
points(
  e_cells[idx_highlight],
  e_genes[idx_highlight],
  col = cols_highlight,
  pch = 19,
  cex = 1.3
)
text(
  e_cells[idx_highlight],
  e_genes[idx_highlight],
  labels = labels_highlight,
  col = cols_highlight,
  pos = 3  # label above the point; try 4 for "to the right"
)
legend(
  "bottomright",
  legend = labels_highlight,
  col    = cols_highlight,
  pch    = 19,
  pt.cex = 1.3,
  bty    = "n"  # no box around legend (optional)
)
```

```{r}
pve <- flashier_snmf_summary$pve
eps <- 0 
pve_log <- log10(pve + eps)

pve_log_min <- quantile(pve_log, 0.02, na.rm = TRUE)
pve_log_max <- quantile(pve_log, 0.98, na.rm = TRUE)
pve_log_clipped <- pmin(pmax(pve_log, pve_log_min), pve_log_max)

pve_scaled <- (pve_log_clipped - min(pve_log_clipped)) /
              (max(pve_log_clipped) - min(pve_log_clipped))

n_col <- 100
pal <- colorRampPalette(c("lightgray", "skyblue", "darkblue"))(n_col)
idx_col <- pmin(pmax(1, floor(pve_scaled * (n_col - 1)) + 1), n_col)
col_points <- pal[idx_col]


pdf("figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS5_scatter_e_active_cells_vs_genes.pdf", width = 6, height = 6)
plot(
  e_cells, e_genes,
  xlab = "Expected number of active cells",
  ylab = "Expected number of active genes",
  log  = "xy",
  col  = col_points,
  pch  = 19,
  main = "Expected active cells vs genes per GP\n(colored by PVE)"
)

brks_pve <- c(1e-7, 1e-5, 1e-3, 1e-2, 0.1, 0.2)  
brks_pve <- brks_pve[brks_pve >= min(pve) & brks_pve <= max(pve)]

brks_log <- log10(brks_pve + eps)
brks_log_clipped <- pmin(pmax(brks_log, pve_log_min), pve_log_max)
brks_scaled <- (brks_log_clipped - min(pve_log_clipped)) /
               (max(pve_log_clipped) - min(pve_log_clipped))
brks_idx <- pmin(pmax(1, floor(brks_scaled * (n_col - 1)) + 1), n_col)
brks_cols <- pal[brks_idx]

legend(
  "bottomright",
  legend = format(brks_pve, scientific = TRUE, digits = 2),
  col    = brks_cols,
  pch    = 15,
  pt.cex = 1.5,
  title  = "PVE",
  bty    = "n"
)
dev.off()
```


```{r}
plot((gp_active_gene_counts/nrow(F_pm)) ~ I(1 - f_pi_vec))
abline(lm((gp_active_gene_counts/nrow(F_pm)) ~ -1 + I(1 - f_pi_vec)), col='blue')
abline(0,1,col='red')
```


## Figure S6: Relevance of TFs in GPs: details

```{r}
CD4_TF_list <- read.table(paste0(data_path, "/TF-list/CD4_tf_level2_AUC.txt"), header = TRUE)
CD8_TF_list <- read.table(paste0(data_path, "/TF-list/CD8_tf_level2_AUC.txt"), header = TRUE)
CD8aa_TF_list <- read.table(paste0(data_path, "/TF-list/CD8aa_tf_level2_AUC.txt"), header = TRUE)
gdT_TF_list <- read.table(paste0(data_path, "/TF-list/gdT_tf_level2_AUC.txt"), header = TRUE)
DN_TF_list <- read.table(paste0(data_path, "/TF-list/DN_tf_level2_AUC.txt"), header = TRUE)
DP_TF_list <- read.table(paste0(data_path, "/TF-list/DP_tf_level2_AUC.txt"), header = TRUE)
Treg_TF_list <- read.table(paste0(data_path, "/TF-list/Treg_tf_level2_AUC.txt"), header = TRUE)
non_conv_TF_list <- read.table(paste0(data_path, "/TF-list/nonconv_tf_level2_AUC.txt"), header = TRUE)
```

```{r}
threshold <- 0.80
TF_highlights <- c(CD4_TF_list$Gene[CD4_TF_list$auc >= threshold],
                   CD8_TF_list$Gene[CD8_TF_list$auc >= threshold],
                   CD8aa_TF_list$Gene[CD8aa_TF_list$auc >= threshold],
                   gdT_TF_list$Gene[gdT_TF_list$auc >= threshold],
                   DN_TF_list$Gene[DN_TF_list$auc >= threshold],
                   DP_TF_list$Gene[DP_TF_list$auc >= threshold],
                   non_conv_TF_list$Gene[non_conv_TF_list$auc >= threshold],
                   Treg_TF_list$Gene[Treg_TF_list$auc >= threshold])

TF_highlights <- unique(TF_highlights)
```

```{r}
F_pm <- flashier_snmf_summary$F_pm
F_pm_norm_col <- F_pm / matrix(apply(F_pm, 2, function(x) max(abs(x))), nrow = nrow(F_pm), ncol = ncol(F_pm), byrow = TRUE)

# strongly-replicated
factor.info <- read.csv(file = paste0(data_path, "factors_comments_updated.xlsx - factor_pve.csv"), header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
factors_considered <- sort(factor.info$X[factor.info$strongly.replicated])
```


Produce a bar plot show the normalized factor value

```{r}
produce_barplot <- function(
  tf,
  F_pm_norm_col,
  threshold = 0.8,
  use_abs = TRUE,
  select_gp = NULL,        # e.g. 1:68 or c(1,3,10,58) or c("K1","K58")
  top_n = NULL,
  keep_order = TRUE,
  label_step = NULL,       # e.g. 2 or 3; NULL = auto
  cex_axis = 0.7,
  las = 2
) {
  stopifnot(tf %in% rownames(F_pm_norm_col))
  v_all <- F_pm_norm_col[tf, ]
  K_all <- seq_along(v_all)

  # select_gp -> indices
  if (!is.null(select_gp)) {
    idx <- if (is.character(select_gp)) as.integer(sub("^K", "", select_gp)) else as.integer(select_gp)
    idx <- idx[idx >= 1 & idx <= length(v_all)]
  } else {
    idx <- K_all
  }

  v <- v_all[idx]
  score <- if (use_abs) abs(v) else v

  # top_n within selected
  if (!is.null(top_n)) {
    kk <- order(score, decreasing = TRUE)[seq_len(min(top_n, length(score)))]
    idx <- idx[kk]; v <- v[kk]; score <- score[kk]
  }

  # plotting order
  if (keep_order) {
    ord <- order(idx)
    idx <- idx[ord]; v <- v[ord]; score <- score[ord]
  } else {
    ord <- order(score, decreasing = TRUE)
    idx <- idx[ord]; v <- v[ord]; score <- score[ord]
  }

  gp_labels <- paste0("K", idx)
  hit <- score >= threshold

  # axis label density: for ~68, step=2 is usually good
  if (is.null(label_step)) {
    label_step <- if (length(idx) <= 40) 1 else if (length(idx) <= 80) 2 else 3
  }
  tick_i <- seq(1, length(idx), by = label_step)

  # margins for rotated labels
  op <- par(mar = c(9, 4, 3, 1))

  ymin <- min(v, 0) * 1.1
  ymax <- max(v, 0) * 1.1
  if (!is.finite(ymin)) ymin <- -1
  if (!is.finite(ymax)) ymax <- 1

  bp <- barplot(v, names.arg = rep("", length(v)),
                main = tf, ylab = "normalized factor value",
                ylim = c(ymin, max(1.05, ymax)))

  axis(1, at = bp[tick_i], labels = gp_labels[tick_i], las = las, cex.axis = cex_axis)

  # highlight hits
  if (any(hit)) {
    points(bp[hit], v[hit], pch = 19)
  }

  par(op)
  invisible(gp_labels[hit])
}

# produce figures for all TF_highlights, and store in a single PDF
pdf("figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS6_TF_bars.pdf", width = 6, height = 6)
for (i in 1:length(TF_highlights)) {
  produce_barplot(TF_highlights[i], F_pm_norm_col,
                threshold = 0.8,
                select_gp = factors_considered,
                label_step = 2)
}
dev.off()
```

## Figure S7: Enrichment of marker sets in GPs

Define set of markers for each GP based on threshold and rank:

```{r}
make_ucell_features <- function(gp_marker_sign_list) {
  feats <- lapply(gp_marker_sign_list, function(x) {
    pos <- x$pos
    neg <- x$neg
    
    c(
      if (length(pos)) paste0(pos, "+"),
      if (length(neg)) paste0(neg, "-")
    )
  })
  
  feats <- feats[vapply(feats, length, integer(1)) > 0]
  
  feats <- lapply(feats, unique)
  feats
}

marker_threshold <- 0.25
gp_marker_list <- list()
gp_marker_sign_list <- list()
for (i in 1:ncol(Protein_F_pm)) {
  gp_name <- colnames(Protein_F_pm)[i]
  marker_values <- Protein_F_pm[, i]
  marker_genes <- rownames(Protein_F_pm)[which(abs(marker_values) >= marker_threshold)]
  
  if (length(marker_genes) > 5) {
    top_indices <- order(-abs(marker_values[marker_genes]))[1:5]
    marker_genes <- marker_genes[top_indices]
  }
  
  gp_marker_list[[gp_name]] <- marker_genes
  
  marker_genes_pos <- marker_genes[which(marker_values[marker_genes] >= marker_threshold)]
  marker_genes_neg <- marker_genes[which(marker_values[marker_genes] <= -marker_threshold)]
  gp_marker_sign_list[[gp_name]] <- list(
    pos = marker_genes_pos,
    neg = marker_genes_neg
  )
}
features_ucell <- make_ucell_features(gp_marker_sign_list)
```

```{r}
library(UCell)

Knames <- colnames(Protein_F_pm)
names(gp_marker_sign_list) <- paste0("Set_", colnames(Protein_F_pm))
names(gp_marker_list) <- paste0("Set_", colnames(Protein_F_pm))
Set_names <- names(gp_marker_sign_list)

custom_score <- matrix(NA_real_,
                       nrow = length(Knames),
                       ncol = length(Set_names),
                       dimnames = list(Knames, Set_names))

for (set_name in Set_names) {
  markers_neg <- gp_marker_sign_list[[set_name]]$neg

  Protein_F_pm_signed <- Protein_F_pm
  if (length(markers_neg) > 0) {
    Protein_F_pm_signed[markers_neg, ] <- -Protein_F_pm_signed[markers_neg, ]
  }

  out <- ScoreSignatures_UCell(
    matrix   = as.matrix(Protein_F_pm_signed),
    features = gp_marker_list[set_name],   
    maxRank  = nrow(Protein_F_pm_signed)
  )

  custom_score[, set_name] <- out  
}
```

```{r}
# custom_score: matrix with rows = GPs (e.g. K1, K2, ...), cols = marker sets
plot_marker_set_barplots <- function(custom_score,
                                     sort_gps = TRUE,    # TRUE: order GPs by score within each plot
                                     out_pdf = NULL,     # e.g. "ucell_marker_sets.pdf" (multi-page)
                                     width = 9, height = 8) {

  custom_score <- as.matrix(custom_score)

  df <- as.data.frame(custom_score) |>
    tibble::rownames_to_column("gp") |>
    pivot_longer(-gp, names_to = "marker_set", values_to = "score") |>
    filter(!is.na(score))

  make_plot <- function(ms) {
    d <- df |> filter(marker_set == ms)

    if (sort_gps) {
      d <- d |> mutate(gp = reorder(gp, score))  # sort by score
    } else {
      d <- d |> mutate(gp = factor(gp, levels = rownames(custom_score)))
    }

    ggplot(d, aes(x = gp, y = score)) +
      geom_col() +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(title = ms, x = NULL, y = "Enrichment score") +
      theme_bw(base_size = 11)
  }

  marker_sets <- colnames(custom_score)

  if (!is.null(out_pdf)) {
    pdf(out_pdf, width = width, height = height, onefile = TRUE)
    for (ms in marker_sets) print(make_plot(ms))
    dev.off()
    message("Saved: ", out_pdf)
    invisible(NULL)
  } else {
    # return list of ggplot objects (useful in Rmarkdown)
    plots <- lapply(marker_sets, make_plot)
    names(plots) <- marker_sets
    plots
  }
}

plot_marker_set_barplots(custom_score, sort_gps = TRUE, out_pdf = "figures/Supplementary_Figures/FigureS7_marker_set_enrichment_over_GPs.pdf")
```
